title: Minimalist Line Art Everyday City Travel Poster AI
sourceTitle: Minimalist Line Art Everyday City Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-high-resolution minimalist line-art everyday city travel poster for Tokyo everyday street crossing with commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, compact storefronts and distant train-line details, featuring TOKYO / JAPAN plus a few clean local-style storefront signs, readable and intentional. Subject: Tokyo everyday street crossing with commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, compact storefronts and distant train-line details shows the destination through a stylish everyday urban scene with locals, commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, storefronts, transit details, and local lifestyle rather than postcard tourism. Scene: urban morning lifestyle scene where the city identity appears through signage, street rhythm and architectural density rather than a tourist postcard defines the city identity through street rhythm, signage, architecture, transport signs, cafes, shops, landmarks integrated into daily life, and culturally recognizable details. Composition: Fixed central street-scene composition: iconic street, intersection, alley, tram street, or pedestrian avenue in the middle; foreground everyday people; background local signage, storefronts, restaurants, transport details, and subtle landmarks; large destination typography at top center with clean subtitle below. Signature Elements: Everyday city street, locals and commuters, compact storefronts, transport details, naturally integrated landmarks, authentic local-language typography, minimalist line-art system, and non-postcard travel identity. Style: Minimalist line-art travel poster with ultra-clean vector illustration, precise monoline architecture, Swiss-modern poster restraint, stylish urban lifestyle storytelling, and premium editorial travel finish. Color Palette: Restrained one-color or limited silkscreen palette with clean paper background, dark linework, one or two city-specific accent colors, and readable typography contrast. Lighting: Graphic daylight impression through clean line density, subtle flat shadows, and balanced contrast rather than photoreal lighting. Camera: Straight-on or gently elevated poster view of an everyday urban street, enough depth to show foreground people, midground shops, and background architecture without becoming cluttered. Materials: Crisp vector linework, poster paper texture, storefront sign shapes, street furniture, tram rails, bicycles, cafe chairs, architectural outlines, and clean silkscreen-like color blocks. Typography: TOKYO / JAPAN plus a few clean local-style storefront signs, readable and intentional appears as the large destination title, country or local-language subtitle, and a few intentional local-style signs; all text must be readable, sparse, and culturally appropriate. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Ultra-high-resolution minimalist line-art everyday city travel poster for Tokyo everyday street crossing with commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, compact storefronts and distant train-line details, featuring TOKYO / JAPAN plus a few clean local-style storefront signs, readable and intentional. Subject: Tokyo everyday street crossing with commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, compact storefronts and distant train-line details shows the destination through a stylish everyday urban scene with locals, commuters, cyclists, cafe visitors, storefronts, transit details, and local lifestyle rather than postcard tourism. Scene: urban morning lifestyle scene where the city identity appears through signage, street rhythm and architectural density rather than a tourist postcard defines the city identity through street rhythm, signage, architecture, transport signs, cafes, shops, landmarks integrated into daily life, and culturally recognizable details. Composition: Fixed central street-scene composition: iconic street, intersection, alley, tram street, or pedestrian avenue in the middle; foreground everyday people; background local signage, storefronts, restaurants, transport details, and subtle landmarks; large destination typography at top center with clean subtitle below. Signature Elements: Everyday city street, locals and commuters, compact storefronts, transport details, naturally integrated landmarks, authentic local-language typography, minimalist line-art system, and non-postcard travel identity. Style: Minimalist line-art travel poster with ultra-clean vector illustration, precise monoline architecture, Swiss-modern poster restraint, stylish urban lifestyle storytelling, and premium editorial travel finish. Color Palette: Restrained one-color or limited silkscreen palette with clean paper background, dark linework, one or two city-specific accent colors, and readable typography contrast. Lighting: Graphic daylight impression through clean line density, subtle flat shadows, and balanced contrast rather than photoreal lighting. Camera: Straight-on or gently elevated poster view of an everyday urban street, enough depth to show foreground people, midground shops, and background architecture without becoming cluttered. Materials: Crisp vector linework, poster paper texture, storefront sign shapes, street furniture, tram rails, bicycles, cafe chairs, architectural outlines, and clean silkscreen-like color blocks. Typography: TOKYO / JAPAN plus a few clean local-style storefront signs, readable and intentional appears as the large destination title, country or local-language subtitle, and a few intentional local-style signs; all text must be readable, sparse, and culturally appropriate. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
